title: Minecraft OST Music Discs
description: Adds The Full Minecraft OST as Music Discs
body:
Whats New in 1.7

- Chaos Cubed Game Soundtrack
- Chaos Cubed Trailer Soundtrack
- Live March 2026
- Chinese Mythology
- Egyptian Mythology
- Frozen Planet II
- Planet Earth III
- Retro Arcade Action
- Dungeons & Dragons
- Whimsical Compilation
- Tetris
- Hello Kitty & Friends


**RESOURCE PACKS ARE STILL ON GOOGLE DRIVE THEY ARE STILL TO BIG. ITS ALMOST 2 GIGS NOW**

[Resource Pack Download ](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/18hgk3_60F50eeHmM3oRXOiAOreD4wApn)

This data pack adds the entire Minecraft Music Library as Music Discs into the vanilla game so you can find them all over your world and listen to them when ever.

Discs can be found in the following locations 
- Desert Temple (Chests And Archeology) 
- Desert Wells
- Warm And Cold Ocean Ruins (Chests And Archeology) 
- Trail Ruins
- Ruined Portals
- Nether Fortress
- Tresure, Bridge, Hoglin Stables, and General Bastions 
- Trial Chambers (Pots And Both Vaults)
- Village Plains, Tiaga, Snowy, Desert, and Savanna Houses
- Shipwrecks
- Jungle Temples
- Buried Tresure 
- Stronghold
- End City
- Ancient City
- Mineshafts
- Dungeons 
- Woodland Mansion
- Igloo
- Pillager Outpost
- Piglin Bartering
- Cat Morning Gift
- Fishing
- Elder Guardians
- Hero of the Village Gifts
- Breezes
- Llamas
- Guardians
- Zombies and Husks
- Pillager Raid Captians
- Pufferfish
- Drowned

As of this update I have added the entire Minecraft Music Library as discs so going forward updates are going to slow until stuff is released. I will add these when they are released like Dungeons II and its 2 confermed DLCs and A Minecraft Movie Squared so I still have my work cut out for me.

I still don't have a place to contact me if you have questions or suggestions but I hope to soon. In the mean time I am still available on Reddit if needs be u/lumfdoesgaming.
